program.requirementsInfo: For this program, you need to upload the following documents:

hero.title: Committed to Regional Development
hero.subtitle: For more than two decades, Aseder has been the engine of change for thousands of people in Northern Cauca, providing quality education and growth opportunities.

history.title: Our History
history.p1: Founded in 2000 in Santander de Quilichao, the Center for Educational Advising for Regional Development (Aseder) was born from a clear vision: to close educational gaps in Northern Cauca and empower communities through knowledge.
history.p2: With over 25 years of experience, we have evolved from a small training center into a leading institution with multiple locations and a diversified academic offer including adult high school and high-impact technical vocational programs.
history.p3: Our history is the story of thousands of graduates who, with effort and dedication, have transformed their lives and those of their families, becoming engines of change for our region.
history.quote: Transforming lives through knowledge and regional service.

mission.title: Social and Community Mission
mission.p1: Our work transcends the classroom. We are deeply committed to the inclusion of the most vulnerable populations, including indigenous communities, Afro-descendants, community mothers, and people in resocialization processes.
mission.p2: We understand education as a bridge towards peace and equity. Therefore, we design programs that not only provide technical skills but also foster leadership and social responsibility in each of our students.
mission.p3: We believe in an educational model where no one is left behind, adapting our resources to reach rural areas and overcoming the geographical and social barriers of Northern Cauca.

vision.text: To be the leading educational institution in Northern Cauca by 2030, recognized for our academic innovation and our deep commitment to social transformation and territorial peace.

graduates.label: Graduates
graduates.desc: People who have improved their quality of life with us.

commitment.label: Social Commitment
commitment.desc: Focused on the inclusion of vulnerable populations.

impactPage.title: Regional Impact and Social Commitment
impactPage.subtitle: Transforming Northern Cauca since 2000 through education and empowerment.
impactPage.intro: Aseder is not just an educational institution; it is a pillar of development in a region that has faced historic challenges. Our presence in Santander de Quilichao and Miranda is a testament to resilience.

naya.title: The Path of Naya
naya.text: Five students from the Naya region walked for three days each week, facing difficult topography and public order issues, just to receive health classes. Their four-semester effort is the heart of our mission.

communities.title: Real Inclusion
communities.text: We serve indigenous and Afro-descendant communities, women heads of household, and former conflict actors, providing second opportunities to those who need them most.

technicalPage.title: Vocational Technical Programs
technicalPage.subtitle: Practical training designed for the real needs of the health and administrative sectors.

clinic.title: Nursing Practice Clinic
clinic.text: We have our own equipped practice clinic so that our students develop real skills before facing the world of work.
clinic.secondaryText: Our clinic allows nursing and health students to practice in a controlled environment, complying with the quality standards required by the Ministry of Education.

detail.ctaText: Enroll now and transform your future with quality education.

nursing.title: Nursing Assistant
nursing.desc: Comprehensive patient care and clinical support.
nursing.objectives: To train technical personnel with solid knowledge and ethical values to provide comprehensive nursing care to patients at different levels of complexity.
nursing.profile: You can work in Hospitals, Clinics, Health Centers, and home care, supporting clinical procedures and direct patient care.

oralHealth.title: Oral Health Assistant
oralHealth.desc: Prevention and assistance in dental offices.
oralHealth.objectives: To train in technical assistance to the dental professional, instrument management, and promotion of oral hygiene habits.
oralHealth.profile: Perform in private dental offices and oral health clinics, managing materials and assisting in dental procedures.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy Services Assistant
pharmacy.objectives: To develop skills in the reception, storage, and dispensing of medications under current legal regulations.
pharmacy.profile: Work in commercial pharmacies, institutional drugstores, and medicine warehouses, providing safe care to the user.

veterinary.title: Veterinary Assistant
veterinary.desc: Care and assistance in veterinary clinics.
veterinary.objectives: To provide technical support in the care, management, and welfare of animals in clinical and commercial settings.
veterinary.profile: Ideal for working in Veterinary Clinics, animal aesthetic centers (Grooming), and specialized pet stores.

foodIndustry.title: Food Industry Quality
foodIndustry.desc: Quality control and processes in food production.
foodIndustry.objectives: To guarantee the safety and quality of food through process control and application of food safety standards.
foodIndustry.profile: Work in food processing plants, quality laboratories, and institutional food services.

earlyChildhood.title: Early Childhood Care
earlyChildhood.desc: Education and care for child development.
earlyChildhood.objectives: To train educators capable of stimulating the comprehensive development of children in their first years of life.
earlyChildhood.profile: Perform in Kindergartens, Child Development Centers (CDI), and community child care programs.

occupationalHealth.title: Occupational Health & Safety
occupationalHealth.desc: Prevention of occupational risks and industrial safety.
occupationalHealth.objectives: To implement prevention and risk control measures to protect the health of workers in organizations.
occupationalHealth.profile: Assistant in the OHS area of any public or private company, ensuring compliance with industrial safety standards.

trafficAgent.title: Traffic Agent
trafficAgent.objectives: To train in road regulation, accident prevention, and application of land traffic regulations.
trafficAgent.profile: You can work as support in municipal traffic secretariats, transport companies, and mobility consultancies.

publicProgramsPage.title: Our Programs
publicProgramsPage.subtitle: Technical and academic training designed for work and human development, with a focus on our region's productive needs.

publicCampusPage.title: Our Campuses
publicCampusPage.subtitle: Discover our strategically located facilities, bringing quality education across the Northern Cauca region.
publicCampusPage.empty: No campuses available at this time.

contact.title: Need more information?
contact.subtitle: Contact us to learn more about our campuses, office hours, and directions.

admissionsPage.title: Admissions
admissionsPage.subtitle: Start your journey towards professional success. Simple and accessible enrollment process for all.

requirements.title: General Requirements
requirements.item2: Certificate of studies of the last grade passed.

process.title: Enrollment Process
process.step2: Present the requirements at our main campus.
process.step4: Formalize your enrollment and start classes.

cta.title: Ready to Start?
cta.text: Our admissions team is ready to accompany you every step of the way.

studentLifePage.title: Student Life
studentLifePage.subtitle: More than just studying: a vibrant community dedicated to personal growth and regional service.

campus.title: Our Locations
campus.p1: We have modern facilities in Santander de Quilichao and Miranda, equipped to provide practical, high-quality training.
campus.p2: Our spaces are designed to encourage collaboration and technical learning, with specialized laboratories in health and administrative areas.

impact.title: Regional Impact
impact.p1: Aseder consolidates itself as a pillar of development in Northern Cauca, forming upright professionals who provide real solutions to their communities.
impact.p2: Our graduates are the reflection of our work: territorial leaders who drive social and economic progress from their respective fields.
